<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Cariprazine Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Reagila is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia in adult patients.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>schizophrenia（99.1%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（98.7%）</li>
<li>hydranencephaly (disease)（98.5%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（98.4%）</li>
<li>congenital disorder of glycosylation with defective fucosylation（98.4%）</li>
<li>Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease, demyelinating, type 1G（98.3%）</li>
<li>syndromic myopia（98.3%）</li>
<li>myopia X-linked（98.2%）</li>
<li>myopia 26, X-linked, female-limited（98.1%）</li>
<li>atypical glycine encephalopathy（97.9%）</li>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（96.5%）</li>
<li>distal 17p13.3 microdeletion syndrome（91.8%）</li>
<li>bipolar disorder（89.8%）</li>
<li>hydrops-lactic acidosis-sideroblastic anemia-multisystemic failure syndrome（86.8%）</li>
<li>agoraphobia（85.5%）</li>
<li>anxiety disorder（84.2%）</li>
<li>benign paroxysmal torticollis of infancy（84.0%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（79.8%）</li>
<li>dysthymic disorder（74.6%）</li>
<li>Malan overgrowth syndrome（71.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
